meaning: n.震颤(性)麻痹,帕金森病,帕金森神经机能障碍
examples: To study effective method for disordered sports of parkinsonism.
[Objective] To study effective method for disordered sports of parkinsonism.
In addition, 1 of the 10 patients had developed mild parkinsonism; the other 2 had died of unrelated causes.
Over 30% were suicidal at some point, and a few experienced problems with physical movement known as parkinsonism.
Mr. Levine also has a form of Parkinsonism, related to Parkinson's disease, that, along with the medication used to treat it, has contributed to shaking in his left hand.
